testcase.name: 3120-concept-relationship-node-linkrole-testcase
Concept Relationship Node Linkrole Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a concept relationship node with different linkroles

variation.name: Concept relationship node with custom link role
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A custom link role for the presentation network is specified. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with custom link role, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A custom link role for the presentation network is specified.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with parameterized link role
variation.description: Two tables each with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. Each table displays the presentation network for a different link role. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a link role expression that evaluates to an invalid URI
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the link role using an XPath expression that evaluates to an invalid URI.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with an empty link role expression
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the link role using an XPath expression that evaluates to the empty string.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a link role expression that evaluates to a sequence
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the link role using an XPath expression that evaluates to a sequence of more than one URI.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a simple link role expression
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. The link role is specified using an XPath expression.
